headline: Drug Screening Market Research and Global Forecast Report 2026-2036: Increasing Demand in Various Sectors Such As Workplaces, Criminal Justice Systems, and Drug Treatment Centers
summary: The global drug screening market is set to surge from USD 8.29 billion in 2026 to approximately USD 25.3 billion by 2036, growing at a CAGR of 11.8%, according to a forecast report. Key growth drivers include increased workplace safety concerns and the expansion of substance abuse prevention programs. The report segments the market by product type (analyzers, rapid testing devices, consumables, services), sample type (urine, oral fluid, breath, hair), technology, end user, and application areas.
